meaning: adj.卑下的,微贱的,谦逊的,粗陋的vt.使...卑下,挫,贬抑
examples: He always makes much of his humble origins.
His views come from his own humble beginnings.
He gave a great performance, but he was very humble.
The humble dish of hummus represents, quite literally, the melting pot of Israeli culture.
In contrast to the humble exterior, the interior features clean lines and a light colour scheme.
